calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Fred C. Stinnett To Perpetuate Testimony Of James Stinnett By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: THE PETITION OF FRED C. STINNETT TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF JAMES STINNETT BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. section 2035.010. Petitioner filed proofs of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. No opposition filed. All parties must file a Notice of Appearance within two court days upon receipt of this order. The deposition is to take place by Zoom technology within 30 days of this order unless the parties agree otherwise. Order signed. Judge: Cynthia M. Lee, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (503/CML)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Fred C. Stinnett To Perpetuate Testimony Of James Stinnett By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Continued To May-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
